2 / 6
🎂 Friday · Ipoh
26th June
Quick Birthday Night Out in Ipoh 🌙
During the day
Working Day 💻
We will be working during the day — saving the energy for tonight!
20:30 – 22:00
Birthday Cake & Gift Reveal 🎁
Celebrate your actual birthday right after work at Coco Craft Bakehouse Ipoh (Jalan Market). Unwind and enjoy their rich chocolate cake, and reveal your birthday gift to kick off the celebratory weekend!
✨ The day has finally come! Happy Birthday 💙
3 / 6
🌆 Saturday · KL
27th June
KL Birthday Adventure — Pink Outfits! 💗
09:00 – 11:30
Road Trip: Ipoh → KL 🚗
Pick me up at home. Grab-and-go car brunch/snacks on the road.
Make sure we matched the pink outfit!
11:30 – 12:45
Ilham Tower Aesthetic Art Date 🎨
Drive into Ilham Tower Carpark (RM5 flat). Ilham Gallery Level 5 — free entry, explore minimal spaces for outfit photos while our pink outfit and makeup are totally fresh. Closed 7pm, last entry 6:30pm.
12:45 – 14:00
Kinokuniya Date @ Suria KLCC 📚
Walk 1 min to Ampang Park LRT → Kelana Jaya line 1 stop to KLCC. Head up to Level 4 to browse Kinokuniya, catching massive window views of the park fountains.
14:00 – 16:00
Aquaria KLCC & Shark Feeding 🦈
Underground air-conditioned tunnel from Suria KLCC straight to the KL Convention Centre basement. Pre-booked tickets — aim for good seats by 14:45 for the 15:00 Shark Feeding Show!
16:00 – 16:30
Indoor Walk & MRT to TRX 🚇
Exit Aquaria → KLCC-to-Bukit Bintang pedestrian bridge → Bukit Bintang MRT → 1 stop directly to Tun Razak Exchange MRT.
16:30 – 18:00
Birthday Dinner @ Yakiniku Kuro TRX 🥩
Arrive seamlessly at TRX mall basement. Zero queues, claim your birthday treat — a 100g Karubi plate — and start grilling!
18:00 – 22:00
TRX City Park Sunset Rooftop 🌅
Escalators to Level 3 Rooftop TRX City Park. Step up at 18:15 for gorgeous sunset photos. Talk about our favourite parts of the day.
22:00
Heading Back Safely 🏠
MRT Putrajaya line 2 stops back to Ampang Park → pick up car at Ilham Tower → safe cruise home via MEX highway.
4 / 6
🎓 Sunday · KL
28th June
Graduation & Concert Night 🎵
09:00 – 15:30
Graduation Ceremony Morning 🎓
Waking up at Putrajaya. You and family head off for Mija's graduation. Don't forget to rest in between and get ready for the evening!
17:00 – 19:00
Pick Up & Travel to Town 🚗
You drive back to KL to fetch me from Seri Wahyu. Then head over to the Pasar Seni / Chinatown area.
19:00 – 20:00
Pasar Seni Wanderings 🏮
Park around Chinatown. Walk down Petaling Street, check out the cultural alleyways, snap photos together if possible.
20:00 – 01:00
Live Music & Concert Night 🎸
Enjoy our celebratory concert night out together at Pasar Seni! Grab some local street food or coffee for late-night fuel before the peaceful drive back home to Ipoh.
😢 Last night of the birthday weekend…
5 / 6
☕ Monday · Ipoh
29th June
Back in Ipoh — Rest & Recharge 🛌
02:30 – 03:00
Safe Arrival in Ipoh 🏠✨
Arrive safely back in Ipoh after the epic late-night drive home.
Morning
Reset & Sleep In 😴
Reset, sleep in, and relax after an epic weekend! We both took the day off today — fully deserved.
Evening
Quick Coffee Date ☕
Wind down the birthday weekend with a quick coffee together later that evening. The perfect, peaceful ending to an unforgettable celebration!
🎉 Happy Birthday, Amir Irfan! What a weekend!
🎂💙🦈🎓🎵☕
An epic birthday weekend to remember!
26 – 29 June 2025 · Ipoh & Kuala Lumpur
6 / 6
